rows.title: [Feature Request]: Multi-lane concurrency support for sub-agents via sessions_spawn
Sandbox: fix Dockerized browser bridge and tab creation
[Feature]: Per-binding and per-agent permissionMode for ACP sessions
feat(control-ui): add cron calendar timeline view
fix: resolve exec PATH fallback, layered browser diagnostics, and cron force-run deadlock
Speed up install smoke Docker builds
[Bug/Docs]: local+hybrid memory_search quality can appear unstable due to extraPaths path drift + benchmark-file contamination
fix(hooks): load workspace hooks for non-default agents
Browser: harden noVNC bootstrap headers
feat(ui): add copy button for assistant messages
feat(tts): add <notts> tag support for visual-only content
[Feature Request] ACP Session Skill Context Injection
Improve runtime recovery for heartbeat, Feishu, and exec sessions
fix(pi-runner): harden context-overflow recovery with one suppress-hook retry
fix(subagents): notify user on announce give-up instead of silently dropping result
fix(errors): friendly message and last-message repair for tool_use/tool_result mismatch (#45385)
[Feature]: Self-hosted STT/TTS provider support in webchat (Route webchat TTS through the gateway instead of browser Speech API)
[Feature]: Sandboxing + ACP
docs(queue): clarify steer behavior with partial streaming and tool boundaries
ACP: classify silent acpx exits as backend unavailable
fix: respect totalTokensFresh flag to avoid showing stale token counts
fix(ui): reset transient chat overlays and style context notice
feat(ui): add timestamp and preview to session list
fix(gateway/discord): respect env proxy vars and prevent ECONNRESET
feat(ui): add active time summary to usage overview
Docs: add saturated session recovery guide
Bug: acpx codex sessions 创建的会话立即退出 - stdin is not a terminal
fix: macOS default browser detection fallback to known paths
feat(status): add API call count to session status and usage footer
feat(telegram): add multi-level menu support to customCommands
ACP: add gateway-owned node-backed runtime
fix: keep tui busy during follow-up waits
feat(gateway): include usage/cost metadata in agent.wait terminal response
fix(acp): add distributed session locking with fail-closed redis fallback
Feature: Native Audio Input for Omni-Modal Models (skip STT transcription)
Docs: add freeCodeCamp OpenClaw full tutorial to showcase
ACP parent session stuck until refresh when yielded waiting for child completion
[Bug]: ACP concurrent session spawns — first agent fails to launch CC process
acpx: add terminal-truth artifacts and strict terminal states
fix(acp): add system_event stream relay to parent session for ACP spawn
sessions_spawn(runtime="subagent") ignores inherited/per-agent subagent thinking defaults and initializes children at low
[Feature]: 🚀 [Performance Insight] Unlocking 26.7k Context Window on M4 Pro: Fixing the 8k Compaction Lag (64GB RAM Only)
feat: Add opt-in ACP parent completion notify for sessions_spawn
memory-lancedb: add configurable timeout/retry for embedding calls
[Feature]: Talk/Voice tab — agent/session switching + per-agent TTS voice
feat(whatsapp): ACP session binding with media threading and prompt fixes
fix(acp): persist spawn labels in target session store
[Feature]: expose promptMode parameter in sessions_spawn for deterministic blank sub-agents
sessions_spawn lacks --bind here equivalent — agent cannot bind ACP session to existing Discord thread
fix(status): honor selected usage auth profile
Session lane stuck in 'running' after run dies — sessions.abort + gateway restart fail to clear stale state
browser tool: add force parameter for click and expose evaluate action
[Feature]: Per-DM/per-chat default ACP binding for auto-spawning ACP sessions on new topics
feature: sessions_spawn ACP delivery to channel (stream output to Zulip/Discord topic)
enhance Makefile with standard build, test, and quality targets
test(exec): land exec v2 contract follow-through
fix(acp): stabilize bridge session keys
[Feature]: Support ACP configured bindings for Telegram DMs (not just groups/topics)
Pass outbound session identity into message_sending and surface guarded gateway send denial
Bug: Gateway falsely marks healthy local vLLM endpoints as timed out/overloaded, causing 1–23 min fallback cascades
security: fix HIGH/CRITICAL vulns in skill scanner, SSRF, hook priority, and token verification
fix(hooks): reject error responses from slug generator and strip post-truncation dashes
[Bug]: ACP configured binding uses parent channel ID for session key — all threads under same channel share one persistent Claude Code process
fix(security): default exec to deny for non-owner auto-reply senders
test: add regression tests for <final> tag stripping in UI message extraction
fix: CompletionDeliveryGate to prevent duplicate ACP completion delivery
feat(plugins): add registerProviderRuntimeAuthOverride API
fix(acp): persistent session recovery for --bind here sessions
fix(cli): clear conflicting OPENCLAW_LAUNCHD_LABEL when --profile is provided
[Bug]: openai-completions fallback candidate is selected, but fallback does not complete successfully through an OpenAI-compatible proxy
feat(msteams): implement sendPayload for interactive approval cards
Explicit ACP agent runs: embedded backend visibility failure and stale final JSON state after sessions_yield
[Feature]: Add provider-specific TTS prompt hints
SSE-backed MCP sessions can stay stale after server restart and fail with 'Session not found'
Unified run trace schema across agent, ACP, subagent, and task flows
feat(amazon-bedrock-mantle): add known context windows for open-weight Mantle models
fix(acp): treat missing cwd as stale bound session
[Bug]: ACP oneshot sessions leave orphaned processes — session reset does not clean up child ACP session keys
Harden Gemini ACP integration against ambient API-key fallback and add generic auth-contract hooks for ACP agents
fix(acp): avoid false zero-diff failures and append session messages
ACP: keep thread-bound follow-ups parent-orchestrated by default, not raw pass-through
ci: skip docs sync & translate-trigger workflows in forks
fix(config): add heartbeat skill allowlist
[Bug]: Desktop cannot use existing Chrome sessions: EasyClaw Google sign-in fails, and user profile attach fails with spawn npx ENOENT
fix(bundle-mcp): coerce stringified object/array params before MCP tool calls
[Feature]: Support WhatsApp disappearing-message expiration for outbound replies
Config schema: add `sandbox`, `routing.rules`, `instances`, and `gateway.nodes.denyPaths`
Web UI: add a clear TTS toggle and default voice picker in Settings
Recover archived (.reset) session transcripts in memory hook + session-logs skill
docs(gateway): clarify IPv4-only BYOH bind path
mcp/channel-bridge: pendingClaudePermissions / pendingApprovals leak — no TTL, no close-clear, no cap
fix(mcp): bound pendingClaudePermissions / pendingApprovals via TTL sweeper + close clear
Bug: memory search live embedding fails ~20–40% with `fetch failed | other side closed` (provider-agnostic; upstream healthy)
CLI watchdog kills sessions that are correctly idle while waiting on a Monitor task
Mattermost plugin drops post_edited events — @mentions added via edit do not trigger agent wake
Memory Dreaming: Light sleep sort prioritizes recency over recallCount, hiding real recall data
fix(hooks): write allowedSessionKeyPrefixes from gmail wizard
ACP startup identity reconcile warns on terminal one-shot sessions
Reliability: active-memory blocks replies and QMD boot initialization can overload multi-agent gateways
[Feature]: doctor api/extendability
docs(commands): document bashForegroundMs clamp bounds (0–30 000 ms)
Bug: dist/entry.js main-path breaks Codex OAuth image generation on Linux while direct runCli()/provider path succeeds
Feature request: per-message token/cost metadata in mobile app and channel surfaces
fix(feishu): emit sent hooks for normal replies
docs: add WhatsApp 408 disconnect troubleshooting runbook
BUG: OpenClaw-managed Codex ACP uses isolated CODEX_HOME without auth bridge and sends unsupported timeout config
memory.qmd.update.embedTimeoutMs default (120 s) is too low for local GGUF; error message doesn't surface the fix
[Bug]: ACPX Codex worker fails when model/thinking overrides are configured
Gateway pairing scope deadlock: CLI cannot approve/reject auto-reissued over-scoped repair requests
Add provider-aware automatic TTS emotion mapping
fix: local GGUF embedding model warmup blocks Node.js event loop for minutes on startup (ARM64/Pi)
Phantom user messages appear in webchat after heartbeat wakes / gateway restart / session repair
[Bug]: MCP tools not discovered by Agent despite successful handshake (200 OK)
google-vertex SSRF guard blocks fake-IP DNS (model.baseUrl not set for built-in providers)
[Bug]: acpx flow run ACP node outputs return empty strings instead of agent replies
fix: Codex startup plugins + WhatsApp history & Docker Codex OAuth
Security: skill SecretRef API keys still leak into exec child environments
[Bug] ACP sessions_spawn doesn't route images to Codex's native vision like acpx codex exec does
fix(providers): skip store:false for proxy-like Responses API endpoints (#78897)
fix(model-auth): resolve per-entry apiKey profile ID references
OpenAI-compatible streaming with llama.cpp saves zero usage (stream closed before final usage chunk)
feat(plugins): expose ACP spawn and prompt in plugin runtime
fix #79026: active-memory recall subagent can deadlock on the main lane inside before_prompt_build
ACPx plugin-tools MCP config test expects source path but resolver returns dist path
test(acpx): accept built-dist MCP server resolution when dist exists
feat(memory/embeddings): add openai-compatible provider for self-hosted servers (llama.cpp, Ollama, vLLM, TGI, LocalAI)
fix(acpx): strip provider API keys from child harness env
[Feature/Bug]: Local Ollama embeddings fail when proxy is enabled (SSRF defenses ignore NO_PROXY)
Harden node exec approval precheck env [AI]
ci: harden GitHub Actions supply-chain boundaries
cron: allow retries for local model preflight
[Feature]: ACPX Codex sandbox should inherit user-installed plugins (e.g. Superpowers)
Feature/exec denylist
Fix iMessage slash command acknowledgements
[Bug]: Memory provider cutover to Ollama leaves production index in mixed OpenAI/Ollama vector state after live sync/reload
ACP/Codex child tasks can be marked succeeded with progress-only output and no final deliverable
fix(clawhub): preserve base URL path prefix [AI-assisted]
[Bug]: doctor --fix silently migrates intentional openai-codex/ config to openai/, breaking PI+OAuth runtime and causing 3-4x token inflation
feat(gateway): forward frequency_penalty, presence_penalty, and seed via OpenAI-compatible HTTP gateway
[Bug]: Per-agent identity overlay dropped on cron --announce and heartbeat target-channel Slack pushes (announce path; reply path was fixed in #38235)
[Bug]: Make Dream Diary narrative timeout configurable for slow/serial local model backends
[Bug]: Telegram group TTS for sub-agent reports success in /tts status but voice never delivered (2026.5.12)
[Bug]: Hook ingress token unlocks password-mode gateway auth
[codex] Fix macOS app copyright year
[Bug]: 2026.5.18 Codex Chrome DevTools MCP sidecars accumulate under gateway and drive cgroup memory growth
test(cron): document and test owner-only tool security boundary for isolated cron
fix(session): prefer real tool result over synthetic error in transcript repair
Discord embedded-run prep wedge before strict-agentic, recovery skips sessionId=unknown lanes

Remove skill prelude exec allowlist

[Bug]: Codex runtime/harness is too easy to confuse with gpt-*-codex model fallbacks
Materialize node-host inline interpreter eval before exec approval
Add SafeOps preflight hook for exec tool

fix(codex): stabilize heartbeat dynamic tool schema

[Bug]: @openclaw/codex peer link failure reproduced on 2026.5.19 after update
[codex] Fix macOS app copyright year
Slack channel sends fail: `reconcileUnknownSend` required but no channel adapter implements it
Feature Request: Option to hide/suppress certain sessions from the session list
fix: self-heal lane wedges + restore openai-codex OAuth on embedded path

Clean up isolated cron sessions after runs
